_test_description: turn_completed at full privacy level: query_text, response_text, intent, topics, model_id, ad_rendered all present. Maximum data sharing.

turn.query_text: What are the best noise-cancelling headphones under 300 pounds?
turn.response_text: Based on recent reviews from Wirecutter and What Hi-Fi, the Sony WH-1000XM5 remains the top pick at around 280 pounds. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra is a close second at 299 pounds, with slightly better noise cancellation but less neutral sound.
